about-me.title: About Me
about-me.info-1.title: Who am I?
about-me.info-1.description: Full Stack Developer and Computer Engineer focused on software and web application development. I specialize primarily as a Full Stack and Backend Developer, with experience in modern architectures, distributed systems, and scalable solutions. Throughout my career I have taken on diverse challenges, always prioritizing best practices, code quality, and delivering the best possible product.
about-me.info-2.title: What do I do?
about-me.info-2.description: I build Full Stack applications with a strong emphasis on the Backend, developing services with Java and Spring Boot, as well as TypeScript, Node.js, and Express. On the Frontend I work with React, Astro, and TailwindCSS. I apply design patterns, SOLID principles, and architectures such as microservices, DDD, and hexagonal. I use Docker for containerization and deployment, and I also develop AI agents to build innovative solutions.
about-me.info-3.title: Contact Me!
about-me.info-3.description: If you are interested in my expertise as a Full Stack or Backend Developer, do not hesitate to reach out. I adapt easily to different technological environments and enjoy taking on new challenges. I am ready for the next one!
experience.title: Experience
experience.exp-1.description: In 2019, I completed my first professional internship at RIVIERA S.A., assisting with the graphic design of the company website and social media management, as well as supporting organizational and general office administration tasks.
experience.exp-2.description: As part of my community service internship, I contributed to the development of the interactive educational game 'Mi Rutina' within the Midi Espol project. I designed new game levels using Unity and C#, and implemented client-server communication logic with a dashboard via a REST API in JavaScript/TypeScript to track children's results.
experience.exp-3.description: As part of my business internship at Solinal, I joined the development team for the Etiquetas project. I developed and implemented new features using React, TailwindCSS, and Node.js, refactored frontend components to improve maintainability and user experience, and optimized application performance by reducing response times across multiple sections.
experience.exp-4.description: Developed a cross-platform desktop application with React and Electron for operational management and report generation, reducing calculation times and minimizing human error. Designed and implemented the backend with Spring Boot using RESTful APIs and WebSockets, JWT authentication, and microservices with Express and FastAPI for document generation and Odoo integration. Deployed all services with Docker on Render and Supabase.
experience.exp-5.description: Currently, I work as a Software Developer at the Escuela Superior Politécnica del Litoral (ESPOL) as part of the financial team within the Management of Technologies and Information Systems (GTSI) department.

skills.personal-skills.title: Personal Skills
projects.title: Projects
projects.project-dashboard.name: Dashboard
projects.project-dashboard.description: A website that shows the temperature, precipitation, UV rays, and other possible data for the next 5 days of a city in Ecuador. It includes a selector for provinces and cities for visualization. It also displays flood threat monitoring that could occur in the country. These data are gathered from https://www.gestionderiesgos.gob.ec/monitoreo-de-inundaciones/ via CORS for educational purposes.
projects.project-landing.name: Landing
projects.project-landing.description: A landing page related to video games, inspired by platforms like Steam. The main focus is on the website design. It does not have internal functionality.
projects.project-mpa.name: MPA
projects.project-mpa.description: A team project built with Angular that presents speedrun statistics (completing a game quickly). The main idea of the project lies in using the Angular framework to create shared components, interfaces, and connect to a Firebase database.
projects.project-flex-travel.name: Flex & Travel
projects.project-flex-travel.description: A mobile application project aimed at boosting tourism for all types of businesses. Both the frontend and backend were worked on separately. To view the backend of the project, visit: https://github.com/Fausto-Briones/LP-Proyecto2.
projects.project-catalogo.name: Video Game Catalog
projects.project-catalogo.description: The project simulates a video game catalog similar to Steam, using data structures like circular linked lists. It also has two views: one for users and another for administrators. Additionally, there are various methods to search for video games.
projects.project-fileviewer.name: File Viewer
projects.project-fileviewer.description:
File viewer that graphically represents the structure of a directory based on the size of its files, using multiway trees. It allows viewing by files, extensions, types, or executables. Custom data structures (ADTs) were implemented.
NOTE: This project is a refactored version of an earlier one, to which I no longer have access due to permission restrictions.
projects.project-rover.name: Rover Simulator
projects.project-rover.description: This project simulates two rovers on Mars, one solar and the other wind-powered. There are craters on Mars where materials will be sensed. The user can move around the planet using commands, plan routes, among other things. The two rovers can be used simultaneously thanks to multithreading.
projects.project-laberinto_encantado.des:
A cooperative and competitive multiplayer game where 4 teams face each other to escape the maze.
You can visit these two sites:
Full Development: https://domorales.github.io/portfolio-momentum/
projects.project-minecraft-api.name: Minecraft API
projects.project-minecraft-api.descripti: Web application and API for Minecraft based on data provided by the game itself and by Minecraft Wiki. This application was built with NextJS, React,Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript, , which also includes documentation in OpenAPI format.
projects.project-omniview.name: OmniView
projects.project-omniview.description: OmniView is a remote viewing system that enables real-time screen sharing across devices. It includes a native Rust agent for efficient capture, a backend gateway for WebRTC signaling and WebSocket proxying, and web clients that play streams using MSE or WebRTC. It supports authentication, controls (pause/resume/config), whitelist/blacklist management, and operation modes 'native', 'backend-pull', and 'browser'. Designed for low latency and distributed deployments.
